reviews.comment:
Tener en cuenta que cierra por la noche. Solo atiende a partir de las 08 am hasta las 00 por lo que le entendí. Pude pagar con tarjeta y te cargan los puntos serviclub. Y con los precios más bajos de argentina. Tiene diesel premium

(Translated by Google)
Keep in mind that it closes at night. It's only open from 8 a.m. to midnight, from what I understand. I was able to pay by card, and they charge my Serviclub points. And they have the lowest prices in Argentina. They also have premium diesel.

reviewReply.comment: Pablo muchas gracias por su valoración!! Que tenga buen viaje.lo esperamos cuando guste!!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjMGFXdS1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Gas station near Customs. The next gas station is only in Tolhuin. Refueling is mandatory to avoid running out of fuel.

(Original)
Posto de combustível próximo a Aduana. Próximo posto somente em Tolhuin. Abastecimento obrigatório para evitar falta de combustível

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Si vienen de Chile, es la primera estación de servicio del lado argentino. A nosotros nos salvó porque veníamos casi sin combustible. Pudimos pagar con tarjeta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. If you're coming from Chile, it's the first gas station on the Argentinian side. It was a lifesaver for us because we were almost out of fuel. We were able to pay by card.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su valoración y visita. Los esperamos nuevamente!!!

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/21560828516332243/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzc3ZxMVh3EAE
